registry_meta.name: Georgia Jurisdiction Recon Registry
registry_meta.purpose: Pre-onboarding recon. Captures the components that drive onboarding cost/feasibility for GA jurisdictions BEFORE onboarding begins. NOT a jurisdiction config; an entry graduates into jurisdictions/{slug}.json only when actually onboarded.

universe.source: Verified 2026-06-10: GMA directory + Census TIGERweb ACS25 (municipalities), NCES CCD 2024-25 agency_type=1 (school systems), Census FIPS set (counties), GA DCA (8 consolidated govts). Full enumeration + recon-coverage diff: research/ga_recon/universe_roster.json; source review: research/ga_recon/UNIVERSE_SOURCES.md

changelog: 0.2 (2026-06-10): added public_comment dimension; BoE coverage round (24 boe_known_areas + 9 boe_population school districts); public_comment backfilled on the 3 onboarded entries; vocab additions: agenda_platform += finalsite; comment_service vocab introduced (+ qualtrics, diligent_community, droplet)

0.2.1 (2026-06-10): adversarial verification pass over all flagged findings (16 confirmed, 4 corrected: Gwinnett deadline inference, Glascock staff emails, CCSD comment-form parent 404, Paulding minutes caught up; Houston upgraded to never-publishes-minutes). Searchable jurisdiction_directory re-seeded to the verified universe (2025 gazetteer + school districts).
0.2.2 (2026-06-10): erratum — CCSD comment-form parent-page '404' was a verifier artifact (truncated URL); full URLs verified live, erroneous gap removed. Verification corrections: 3, not 4.

changelog.change: ERRATUM columbia-county-school-district-ga: agendas ARE published (Edlio year subpages since 2011) and public-comment email exists (contactus@ccboe.net). Single-subpage recon caused a false agenda_missing finding, caught by operator before the records request mailed. METHODOLOGY §3 hardened: section-structure sweep + independent search-engine pass now required for any absence claim.

columbia-county-ga.name: Columbia County
notable_gaps: CCSD is a separate jurisdiction
constitutional officers not modeled as bodies
columbia-county-ga.notes: ALREADY ONBOARDED. CivicClerk OData JSON API. Source of truth = jurisdictions/columbia-county-ga.json.

public_comment.deadline_rule: Request to Speak form must be given to the County Clerk prior to the start of the meeting; email subject line 'Request_to_Speak'

by_body.notes: PDF Request to Speak form; submit by email (subject 'Request_to_Speak'), mail (PO Box 498 Evans GA 30809), fax 706-868-3348, or drop-off at Commission Office, 4th Floor Bldg A, Evans Government Center. Speakers limited to 5 minutes; groups must designate one speaker. Form fields: meeting date, name, address, phone, email, self/group, topic, favor/oppose, concerns, recommendations.

Verbatim from /129/Agendas-Minutes: 'Planning Commission Meetings do not require a Request to Speak form for those wishing to participate during a public hearing or during the public comment portion of the meeting.' Just show up and speak.
General board email published on /304/Board-of-Commissioners; not a formal comment-of-record channel.

public_comment.notes: All verified live this session. Instructions on https://www.columbiacountyga.gov/129/Agendas-Minutes: complete Request to Speak Form and submit to County Clerk Patrice Crawley (pcrawley@columbiacountyga.gov, subject 'Request_to_Speak'). Form PDF downloaded and read: 5-minute limit, deliver to clerk before meeting start, email/mail/fax/drop-off all accepted. The form is a request-to-speak (oral comment in person), so a bot can file the request (plain email, no CAPTCHA) but the comment itself is delivered at the podium. Agendas also on CivicClerk portal https://columbiacoga.portal.civicclerk.com/ (no eComment feature observed). BZA-specific rules not separately published; Planning Commission exception quoted above.

grovetown-ga.name: Grovetown
notable_gaps: clerk email is a role alias, not published as plaintext on the site
grovetown-ga.notes: ALREADY ONBOARDED. 13+ yrs archived PDFs. Source of truth = jurisdictions/grovetown-ga.json.

public_comment.notes: No published public-comment procedure anywhere on cityofgrovetown.com (checked City Council page /198/City-Council, AgendaCenter, site search for 'public comment' and 'citizens comments', FAQ). Verified this session: every Council agenda carries a standing 'Citizens Comments' item (e.g. item 11 on the 2026-06-08 agenda PDF, /AgendaCenter/ViewFile/Agenda/_06082026-307), and May 2026 minutes show citizens simply addressing Mayor Pro-Tem and Council during that item — no sign-up sheet, form, deadline, or remote/email channel is published. Channel 'in_person_only' is inferred from agenda+minutes practice; no Request-to-Speak form exists on the site. recipient_email is the clerk alias supplied from internal data (City Clerk Brian Henderson per May 2026 minutes), NOT verified on the live site this session — emailing the clerk is the only plausible remote route but is unpublished. automatable=false because the only observed channel requires physical attendance.

columbia-county-school-district-ga.name: Columbia County School District
notable_gaps: minutes are Google Docs; some 410-Gone dead
no emailable custodian; staff emails obfuscated
public comment primarily via web form (Policy BCBI, 24h registration); alternative channels exist — email contactus@ccboe.net, phone ext. 5202 (erratum 2026-06-11)
columbia-county-school-district-ga.notes: ALREADY ONBOARDED. First school_district. Source of truth = jurisdictions/columbia-county-school-district-ga.json. ERRATUM 2026-06-11: prior entry claimed agendas not published and no public-comment email — both wrong. Agendas are year-paginated Edlio subpages back to 2011 (recon read one empty landing subpage); contactus@ccboe.net + board phone were first-page Google results. See METHODOLOGY.md §3 (structure sweep + search pass now mandatory for absence claims).

public_comment.deadline_rule: Must register at least 24 hours prior to the regular Board meeting; speakers must check in 15 minutes before the meeting starts
public_comment.captcha_or_tos: Google reCAPTCHA on the Edlio form (isFormsCaptchaActive: true in form JS); no login required
public_comment.notes: Verified live this session. 'Public Participation Request Form' link confirmed in raw HTML of Board Meetings page (uREC_ID=4394898); it iframes an Edlio-hosted form at /apps/form/form.COLCS.sPdNlct.1nS containing reCAPTCHA, fields for name/date/address/email/phone, group representation, '5. Topic/Concern' textarea (no maxlength attribute), signature + confirmation-email fields, and NO file-upload input. 'Rules of Conduct for Public Participation' page (pREC_ID=2362519) verified: register >=24h before regular meeting, check in 15 min early, 3 minutes per speaker, must be Columbia County resident or parent/guardian of a CCSD student, no props/signs, no profane/defamatory remarks or student/employee-identifying info; employee grievances routed to Policy GAE. This is a request-to-speak form (comment delivered orally at meeting). Board Policy BCBI itself could not be retrieved this session — the Simbli policy portal (simbli.eboardsolutions.com/Policy/PolicyListing.aspx?S=36031361) is JS-rendered and a direct ePolicy URL returned 'Invalid URL'; the 24h/3-min constraints above come from the district's Rules of Conduct page, which does not cite BCBI by name. automatable=false due to reCAPTCHA. ERRATUM 2026-06-10: an earlier verification note claimed the Board-Meetings page hosting the form had gone 404 — that was a verifier artifact (the agent fetched the URL truncated to uREC_ID only, which hard-404s; the full URLs with pREC_ID all return 200 and the Board Meetings page is live, re-tested with exact URLs). submit_url intentionally points at the direct Edlio form (apps/form/form.COLCS.sPdNlct.1nS, reCAPTCHA active); the parent page remains a valid navigation path. Lesson recorded: URL liveness checks must use the exact full URL and detect Edlio soft-404 bodies.

richmond-county-school-system-ga.name: Richmond County School System
notable_gaps: Open records intake is portal-only (NextRequest); no named Open Records Custodian or direct custodian email published — only a legal-matters contact (Kim Fletcher Bowden, Policy and Legal Compliance Officer, fletcki@boe.richmond.k12.ga.us, for subpoenas/Notices to Produce, not ORR intake)

No public-comment / public-participation procedure published anywhere found on rcboe.org board pages — sign-up rules for addressing the board are not posted (governed by board policy BCBI in the Simbli policy manual, which is JS-rendered)
Agendas live only on Simbli (JS-heavy), official site links the Simbli index page rather than the meeting listing directly

public_comment.notes: No public participation procedure found on the board pages or board contact page; regular meetings 3rd Tuesday 6 PM, committee meetings 2nd Tuesday 4 PM, 864 Broad Street Augusta. Public-participation rules presumably in policy BCBI in Simbli policy manual (not fetched — JS-rendered). All 10 board member emails are plaintext on /about-us12/board-of-education/school-board-members-contact-information, so direct email to members is possible but is not a published comment channel.

richmond-county-school-system-ga.notes: Board page /about-us12/board-of-education/board links 'Access Meeting Agendas' to https://simbli.eboardsolutions.com/index.aspx?s=4137 (seen in raw HTML); SB_MeetingListing.aspx?S=4137 confirmed live (HTTP 200). Open records page /staff-departments/open-record-requests/open-records-requests states requests 'should be submitted at the following link: richmondcountyschoolsystemga.nextrequest.com' (portal answered with HTTP 204 to curl — JS app, likely bot-gated; flag for automation testing). Site is Finalsite/Blackboard-style, JS-heavy — WebFetch missed content, raw curl required. Onboarding cost: low for agendas (standard Simbli scrape), medium for ORR (NextRequest portal).

mcduffie-county-school-system-ga.name: McDuffie County School System
notable_gaps: No open records request page, designated Open Records Officer, or ORR procedure found anywhere on the district site (search + nav crawl) — county government and sheriff publish ORR procedures but the school system does not
All emails on the Edlio site are Cloudflare-obfuscated ([email protected] placeholders; decoded johnsons@mcduffie.k12.ga.us from data-cfemail)
Board section of site is thin; agendas/minutes exist only on Simbli

public_comment.deadline_rule: complete the Request for Public Input form and submit it to the Superintendent's Office at least 24 hours in advance of the meeting
public_comment.notes: 'Board Meeting Dates and Public Input Information' page (District > Superintendent's Page section) verified this session: Request for Public Input form may be submitted by email to johnsons@mcduffie.k12.ga.us (email was Cloudflare-obfuscated on page; decoded from data-cfemail attribute); questions 706-986-4048; governed by policy BCBI and regulation BCBI-R(1), both linked from the page. This is a request-to-speak workflow (in-person comment at meeting), submitted via plain email with a form attachment — automatable.

mcduffie-county-school-system-ga.notes: Site is Edlio (apps/pages/index.jsp fingerprint). Board of Education page links 'Board Meeting Agendas / Minutes' directly to simbli SB_MeetingListing.aspx?S=4112 (seen in raw HTML, HTTP 200). District office 716 North Lee Street, Thomson GA 30824, (706) 986-4000. Onboarding cost: low (standard Simbli scrape + email comment channel); ORR contact will need a phone/email confirmation since no officer is published.

burke-county-public-schools-ga.name: Burke County Public Schools
notable_gaps: Open Records Officer email is Cloudflare-obfuscated on the page ([email protected]; decoded anharley@burke.k12.ga.us from data-cfemail)
Public-comment sign-up has no online/email channel — phone contact to the Administrative Secretary only
Records Request page conflates student transcript requests with Open Records Act requests on one page

public_comment.deadline_rule: citizens wishing to address the Board during public participation shall sign up at least 24 hours in advance of the meeting by contacting Administrative Secretary Kelly Quick at (706) 554-5101
public_comment.notes: Board > Public Participation page verified this session (uREC_ID=323780&pREC_ID=2302398): advance sign-up (24h) via phone to Kelly Quick, Administrative Secretary; governed by policy BCBI (Simbli policy link S=4021). Phone-only sign-up means not automatable. Meetings: 3rd Tuesday 5 PM, Johnny Jenkins Board Room, 789 Burke Veterans Pkwy, Waynesboro; livestream link posted on homepage on meeting day; recordings on YouTube @burkecountypublicschoolsga844 within two business days.

burke-county-public-schools-ga.notes: Site is Edlio. Agendas verified at Simbli S=4021 (HTTP 200), linked from the Public Participation page. Open Records page (uREC_ID=324393) verified: designated Open Records Officer Mrs. Anna Harley, 706-554-5101, fax 706-554-8051, mail to 789 Burke Veterans Pkwy, Waynesboro GA 30830; dedicated 'SUBMIT AN OPEN RECORDS REQUEST' Edlio web form (pREC_ID=form.BURKECO-D.ueJYCgh.1SA_, HTTP 200); email decoded from Cloudflare obfuscation. Onboarding cost: low — best-documented ORR process of this batch.

jefferson-county-schools-ga.name: Jefferson County Schools
notable_gaps: No open records request page, procedure, or designated Open Records Officer found anywhere on the district site (nav crawl + search) — possible transparency finding; the county government publishes an ORR form but the school district does not
No public-comment / public-participation procedure published on the site (board pages and meeting-schedule page checked; no mention of public, comment, or speak)

public_comment.notes: No procedure published; board-meeting-schedule page text contains no public/comment/speak language. Presumably governed by a BCBI-type policy in the Simbli policy module (SB_ePolicy S=4095), not verified. Regular meetings 2nd Tuesday 5:30 PM; schedule changes posted only on eBoard/Simbli.

jefferson-county-schools-ga.notes: Site is Finalsite ('Powered by Finalsite' in footer). /about-us/simbli page links directly to simbli SB_MeetingListing.aspx?S=4095 (seen in raw HTML, HTTP 200); /about-us/board-of-education/board-meeting-schedule also links Simbli index s=4095. BOE Staff page has plaintext mailto emails for all central-office staff (Superintendent Dr. Samuel Dasher dashers@jefferson.k12.ga.us; Administrative Assistant Wanda Darisaw darisaww@jefferson.k12.ga.us — likely first ORR contact but not designated, so custodian left null). District: 1001 Peachtree Street, Louisville GA 30434, 478-625-7626. Onboarding cost: low for agendas, medium for comment/ORR (both undocumented).

Board nav links simbli SB_MeetingListing.aspx?S=36030862 plus Index.aspx and PolicyListing.aspx (S=36030862), all seen in raw HTML and HTTP 200; also /page/minutes and /page/recordings. Staff emails plaintext on @lcboe.us domain (note: differs from website domain): Superintendent Dr. Howie F. Gunby hgunby@lcboe.us; System Secretary Lynn Odum lodum@lcboe.us — likely ORR contact but not designated, so custodian left null. District: 423 Metasville Road, Lincolnton GA 30817, 706-359-3742. Onboarding cost: low for agendas (standard Simbli), medium for comment/ORR (both undocumented).

public_comment.notes: No public-comment procedure visible on district site or Simbli meeting listing; board policies live in Simbli (S=4179) which would not render server-side. GA districts typically use a sign-up-before-meeting policy (BCBI) but this was not verified.

wilkes-county-schools-ga.notes: Apptegy-powered site. Official BOE nav links 'Board Meeting Agendas and Minutes' directly to simbli.eboardsolutions.com S=4179; live Simbli listing fetched this session shows regular monthly board meetings with published minutes through 04/2026 (05/2026 pending). Onboarding cost low for agenda ingestion (active Simbli archive), higher for records/comment routing since no emails are published.

warren-county-school-system-ga.notes: Google Sites site with an 'Eboard' nav item; BOE page links (via google.com/url redirect) to Simbli S=4171. Live Simbli listing fetched this session shows monthly board meetings with published minutes through 05/2026. Staff directory on /boe publishes plaintext emails incl. Superintendent Dr. Christopher D. Harris, Sr. (charris@warren.k12.ga.us) - the natural ORR recipient though no custodian is designated. Low onboarding cost for agendas; comment/records routing inferred.

glascock-county-consolidated-schools-ga.name: Glascock County Consolidated Schools

'Public Participation in Board Meetings' link on the official BOE page returns HTTP 404 - dead link, verified this session

No board-member or superintendent emails published on the BOE page; department staff emails ARE plaintext on staff pages (e.g. tsmith@glascock.k12.ga.us HR, kkitchens@glascock.k12.ga.us Finance) — corrected 2026-06-10 verification pass
No open-records page or custodian designation
Site search and Google site: search surface no agenda/minutes documents

public_comment.notes: A 'Public Participation in Board Meetings' document is linked from the BOE page, confirming a procedure exists, but the link 404s so the mechanism (sign-up vs written) is unverifiable. Phone fallback: 706-598-2121.

glascock-county-consolidated-schools-ga.notes: ONBOARDED 2026-06-10 as a documented-absence placeholder (source of truth = jurisdictions/glascock-county-consolidated-schools-ga.json; ORR draft research/ga_recon/orr_drafts/glascock-county-consolidated-schools-ga.md). Finalsite-powered site, checked live this session: BOE page (/about-us/board-of-education) has 2026 meeting dates (all ~7:00 PM, mix of 3rd/4th Thursdays), budget/SPLOST PDFs, and board roster, but no agenda or minutes archive. GSBA/Simbli membership material mentions Glascock but no public Simbli site (S=) is linked from the district site. High onboarding cost: agendas would require ORR or in-person collection. 'Verified' applies to the absence findings; name on site appears as both 'Glascock County Consolidated School' and 'Glascock County School System'. Verification 2026-06-10: agenda/minutes absence and 404 participation link re-confirmed live; staff emails found on department pages (custodian still undesignated).

taliaferro-county-school-district-ga.name: Taliaferro County School District
notable_gaps: Board meeting agendas and minutes are not published online - possible OCGA 50-14-1(e)(1)/(e)(2) finding; the district's own charter Governance page states 'All meeting agendas and minutes will be posted on the school website' but none are posted

Contact form requires CAPTCHA and a terms-of-service checkbox
No formal open-records procedure published

public_comment.notes: No public-comment procedure published. Meetings are 3rd Monday 6:30 PM in the school cafeteria (per /schoolboard); board chair (Rrandolph@taliaferro.k12.ga.us) and superintendent emails are plaintext, but neither is designated for comments.

taliaferro-county-school-district-ga.notes: ONBOARDED 2026-06-10 as a documented-absence placeholder (source of truth = jurisdictions/taliaferro-county-school-district-ga.json; ORR draft research/ga_recon/orr_drafts/taliaferro-county-school-district-ga.md). SchoolInsites-powered site, checked live this session. /schoolboard publishes board roster with plaintext emails, 2025 meeting schedule, and an 'Open Board Meetings' legal-notice PDF hosted on content.myconnectsuite.com; /governance promises web posting of agendas/minutes that does not exist. Custodian fields are the superintendent as the de facto records contact (named on the official site with plaintext email) - she is not formally designated custodian, hence overall confidence medium. High onboarding cost: agendas likely obtainable only via ORR email to superintendent.

fulton-county-schools-ga.name: Fulton County Schools
notable_gaps: Portal-only records intake: district explicitly states 'We do not accept requests via email'; openrecords@fultonschools.org is restricted to status updates on existing portal requests
Public comment limited to 7 advance online slots per meeting and a 30-minute total comment period
District recently migrated from BoardDocs to Simbli; legacy go.boarddocs.com/ga/fcss links still circulate in search results (link-rot risk for archived agendas)

public_comment.deadline_rule: online sign-up opens no earlier than 2 weeks before the meeting and closes no later than noon on meeting day; 7 advance slots, remaining slots filled on-site 30 minutes before public comment; substitutes via boardservices@fultonschools.org by noon meeting day
public_comment.notes: Electronic sign-up form embedded on the 'Addressing The Board' page (fultonschools.org/fs/pages/15149); requires name, full street address, email, phone, topic, meeting date; 3 min per speaker; no CAPTCHA/login noted; Board Services confirms availability after submission

fulton-county-schools-ga.notes: Agendas verified live at simbli.eboardsolutions.com/fulton (page titled 'Simbli Board Management Software | Fulton County Schools'); meeting calendar at fultonschools.org/fcs-board-of-education/meeting-calendar links to it directly. Open records page (fultonschools.org/openrecords) verified live: portal-only intake at www4.fultonschools.org/OpenHRRec/OpenRequest/Create, phones 470-254-4926 / 470-254-2327; officer name Alexia Hammonds came from a search snippet of the official site, not seen on the live page this session (treat name as medium confidence). Student records are separate via fultonga.scriborder.com. Onboarding cost: low for agendas (Simbli is scrape-friendly), medium for records (custom ASP.NET portal).

gwinnett-county-public-schools-ga.name: Gwinnett County Public Schools
notable_gaps: Legacy BoardDocs site (go.boarddocs.com/ga/gcps) still indexed alongside current Simbli listing — split agenda history across two platforms is a continuity/link-rot risk

Public comment is in-person delivery only (no remote/written comment read into record); sign-up deadline is 7:00 PM the Wednesday before the (third-Thursday) business meeting — i.e. the day before the meeting, after the Monday-noon agenda posting (verification pass 2026-06-10 corrected an earlier note that claimed the deadline preceded agenda publication)

public_comment.deadline_rule: notify the Superintendent's Office in writing by 7:00 PM on the Wednesday prior to the Board meeting; interpretation services require sign-up by Monday the week of the meeting
public_comment.notes: Sign-up is a Qualtrics form ('Board Signup', confirmed live, JS-rendered, no login/CAPTCHA observed) linked from the 'How to Address the Board' page (gcpsk12.org/fs/pages/2360); speaking is in-person at the 7:00 PM monthly business meeting, 3 min max; students get 30 min block at start, community 60 min at end. Confidence medium because the form renders via JS and field requirements could not be fully inspected.

gwinnett-county-public-schools-ga.notes: Board page (gcpsk12.org/about-us/board) verified live; agendas now on Simbli (meeting listing S=36031119 confirmed live with June 2026 meetings; minutes published per-meeting). Open records page verified live: named officer Alicia Trager, plaintext role-alias email OpenRecordsOfficer@gcpsk12.org, phone 678-301-6340, fax 678-301-6007; written requests via mail/email/fax, no portal. Board office: Coordinator of Board Services, 678-301-6040, MySchoolBoard@gcpsk12.org. Onboarding cost: low (Simbli + plain-email records intake).

cobb-county-school-district-ga.name: Cobb County School District
notable_gaps: Public comment is in-person only with no online sign-up, email, or remote option — sign-in window closes exactly 10 minutes before the meeting

public_comment.notes: Verified at cobbk12.org/public-comment-sign-up-information: 2 minutes per speaker, Chair may prioritize agenda-item speakers; line up outside the side door under the awning. No remote channel of any kind.

cobb-county-school-district-ga.notes: Board page (cobbk12.org/board) and open records page (cobbk12.org/open-records) verified live. atlanta-public-schools-ga.name: Atlanta Public Schools

public_comment.captcha_or_tos: Microsoft Forms — sign-in/anti-bot requirement not verified this session
public_comment.notes: Sign-up via Microsoft Forms link or downloadable paper form, both seen live at paulding.k12.ga.us/board-of-education/public-participation-in-board-meetings; eligibility limited to residents/students/parents/property owners/employees; deadlines and time limits live in Policy BCBI, not on the page.

paulding-county-school-district-ga.notes: Board Meetings Online page links simbli.eboardsolutions.com/index.aspx?S=4125; Simbli meeting listing fetched live (Paulding County Schools, meetings incl. 05/19/2026 Regular Board Meeting; minutes lag resolved by 2026-06-10 verification: 48/50 published, only 05/19/2026 and the upcoming 06/11/2026 unpublished). Records custodian verified on Records Management F.A.Q. page (/Page/415): Beth Beaty, 770-443-8003 ext. 10348, 522 Hardee Street, Dallas GA. Onboarding cost: low for agendas (Simbli), modest for comment automation (MS Forms).

bibb-county-school-district-ga.name: Bibb County School District
notable_gaps: No public-comment / public-participation procedure published anywhere on the district site — board info is offloaded entirely to Simbli; if speaker sign-up exists it is not discoverable online (process-transparency finding, adjacent to OCGA 50-14-1 openness expectations)
'Let's Talk' page is just static contact info, not an actual feedback system
Domain confusion hazard: bibbed.org is Bibb County Schools in ALABAMA (Centreville, AL) and outranks the GA district for board queries — do not ingest bibbed.org for this entry

public_comment.notes: Checked homepage, About Us, and Let's Talk pages live — no sign-up form, deadline, or addressing-the-board instructions found; only district phone numbers. Any public-comment policy presumably sits inside Simbli policy listing (not verified).

bibb-county-school-district-ga.notes: Homepage links Board of Education to simbli.eboardsolutions.com (S=4013); Simbli meeting listing fetched live (Bibb County School District, meetings incl. 06/18/2026 Board Meeting). Open-records page fetched live: Stephanie Hartley, Chief Communications Officer, email or mail, 484 Mulberry Street Suite 365, Macon GA, (478) 765-8548. Onboarding cost: agendas easy via Simbli; public-comment routing will require direct outreach to establish.

houston-county-schools-ga.name: Houston County Schools
notable_gaps: Minutes for ALL 50 meetings listed on the Simbli listing (May 2023 through 06/02/2026) show status UNPUBLISHED (re-verified 2026-06-10) — the district appears to never publish minutes via Simbli; standing OCGA 50-14-1(e)(2) finding, minutes must be obtained another way
Speaker eligibility restricted to Houston County residents, district employees, and business/organization reps; one spokesperson per group
Domain confusion hazard: hcboe.us is Houston County Board of Education in ALABAMA — do not ingest

public_comment.deadline_rule: Request to be on the Board agenda must reach the Superintendent's office at least 24 hours before the meeting; 5-minute limit (3 minutes when multiple speakers address the same issue)
public_comment.captcha_or_tos: Google Form — sign-in requirement not verified this session
public_comment.notes: Process fetched live from hcbe.net/addressingtheboard (Policy BCBD): Google Form, printable form, fax 478-218-7522, or mail to 1100 Main Street, Perry GA; materials for the Board must be handed to the Superintendent/designee (form itself takes no attachments); Superintendent's office (478) 988-6257.

houston-county-schools-ga.notes: hcbe.net/boe links Simbli (S=4089); Simbli listing fetched live (Houston County School District, meetings incl. 06/02/2026 Regular Monthly Board Meeting at 1:00 PM — daytime meetings, relevant for participation-access analysis). Open Records Officer verified live at hcbe.net/openrecords (Community Relations Dept). Board member role-alias emails post1@–post7@hcbe.net seen live. Onboarding cost: low; cleanest of the batch.

douglas-county-school-system-ga.name: Douglas County School System
notable_gaps: On-site agenda/minutes PDF archive (Apptegy document folders) stops at 2024 — 2025+ agendas exist only in Simbli; the stale on-site archive is a dead-end for citizens who don't find the Simbli link
Legacy SharpSchool URL (dcssga.ss19.sharpschool.com) returns 403 yet still ranks in search; douglas.k12.ga.us serves duplicate content of dcssga.org — canonical-source ambiguity
Open Records Officer identified only by role alias, no named custodian published

public_comment.notes: Per dcssga.org/page/public-participation-in-meetings (raw page source read this session): Policy BCBI governs; 'BCBI Public Participation Form' is completed and 'Forms may be emailed to [shilah.prothro@dcssga.org] or faxed to 770-651-2018'. Submission deadline and time limits are in Policy BCBI, not on the page — medium confidence on operational details.

douglas-county-school-system-ga.notes: dcssga.org (Apptegy CMS, org 23180; douglas.k12.ga.us is the same instance) links simbli.eboardsolutions.com/index.aspx?s=4058; Simbli listing fetched live (Douglas County School System, meetings incl. 06/01/2026 Work Session and Board Meeting, 05/18/2026 Board Meeting + 2nd Budget Public Hearing). Open-records page raw source read live: GORA O.C.G.A 50-18-70, email openrecords@dcssga.org or mail. Note: Apptegy pages are JS-rendered — scraper must hit raw HTML/JSON payload, not rendered DOM; BoardBook 'Douglas County' hit during recon was Nevada, and dcsdk12.org is Colorado — both excluded.

lowndes-county-schools-ga.name: Lowndes County Schools
notable_gaps: Public Participation Request Form and Open Records Act Notice are hosted as Google Drive files (link-rot risk, not on district domain)
Open records requests must also be copied to a second officer (Randy Cooper, randycooper@lowndes.k12.ga.us)
Board page says a public-comment portion 'may be set aside' at regular meetings — not guaranteed on every agenda
Domain-confusion hazard: lowndesboe.org is Lowndes County AL, not this district

public_comment.deadline_rule: Written Public Participation Request Form must be returned to the Superintendent's Office at least 24 hours before the regularly scheduled meeting; speakers must first have attempted resolution with school-level admin, district admin, and the Superintendent
public_comment.notes: Per Board Policy BCBI text on /page/board-of-education: 3-minute speaking limit, remarks to Board as a body, groups asked to appoint one spokesperson, Board does not respond (defers to Superintendent). Form is a Google Drive PDF; no email submission address stated.

lowndes-county-schools-ga.notes: Apptegy site (JS-heavy; verified via raw HTML). Board page links Simbli Index.aspx?S=4106 and Policy listing; SB_MeetingListing.aspx?S=4106 confirmed rendering as Lowndes County Board of Education. Open Records Act Notice on /page/public-notices names Lauren Sirmans as primary Open Records Officer with Randy Cooper copied; mail/personal delivery to 1592 Norman Drive, Valdosta, GA 31601 also accepted. All seven board-member emails published in plaintext. Low onboarding cost: Simbli scrape + plain email intake.

coweta-county-school-system-ga.name: Coweta County School System
notable_gaps: No dedicated open-records page — the request form is a Google Doc linked from a homepage quicklink
Records custodian's title not stated anywhere found (form just says send to robin.young@cowetaschools.net)
Meeting dates/times published as a shared Google Doc rather than on-domain
Public-comment speaking requests must reach the BOE office 3 hours before the meeting

public_comment.deadline_rule: Requests to speak must be received at the Board of Education office no later than 3 hours before the meeting is called to order; 45 minutes set aside for public comment at each BOE meeting starting 7:15 p.m.
public_comment.notes: From School Board Information page (cowetaschools.net/en-US/school-board-information-13692135): submit the sign-up/rules sheet (Google Drive PDF) to Dana Roberson (770-254-2801, dana.roberson@cowetaschools.net) or Dean Jackson (770-254-2736). Speaking is in person at meetings (2nd Tuesday, 6:30 p.m., 167 Werz Industrial Blvd, Newnan); the request itself appears emailable, but marked not automatable since the channel exists to schedule in-person remarks.

coweta-county-school-system-ga.notes: SchoolBlocks CMS; cowetaschools.net, cowetaschools.org, and coweta.k12.ga.us all serve the district. Board agendas link to Simbli S=4046 verified on the official meeting-dates page. Open Records Request Form (Google Doc, verified by exporting it) instructs sending the completed form to robin.young@cowetaschools.net and cites the 3-business-day response requirement. Moderate onboarding cost: Simbli scrape is clean, but records/comment artifacts live in Google Docs/Drive off-domain.

fayette-county-public-schools-ga.name: Fayette County Public Schools
notable_gaps: No email address published for the Open Records Officer — intake is an embedded Google Form only
Public comment is in-person sign-up only; no remote, email, or written-comment channel found
Open records form is an embedded Google Form (Google dependency; submissions leave the district domain)

public_comment.deadline_rule: Sign-ups open 30 minutes before each business meeting (6:30-7:00 p.m. for 7:00 p.m. meetings) and before any work session with action items (1:30-2:00 p.m.); sign-up closes at meeting start
public_comment.notes: From fcboe.org/board-of-ed/public-comments: in-person sign-up only, 3 minutes per speaker with a podium timer/buzzer, remarks to the Board as a body through the chair, groups encouraged to designate one spokesperson. Meetings at LaFayette Educational Center, 205 LaFayette Ave, Fayetteville. No remote submission path exists, so nothing to automate.

fayette-county-public-schools-ga.notes: District brands as Fayette County Public Schools / Fayette County Board of Education (fcboe.org). Simbli S=4067 meeting listing and policy listing linked from the board-meeting-schedule page. Open records page (under departments/student-services) verified via raw HTML: names Yolanda Briggs-Johnson, 3-business-day response, embedded Google Form (docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScpuDCY...). Domain-confusion hazard: fcps.net is Fayette County KY. Onboarding cost moderate: agenda scrape easy, but records intake is form-only and comment channel is in-person only.

clarke-county-school-district-ga.name: Clarke County School District
notable_gaps: Public comment is an at-meeting sign-up sheet only; no advance or remote submission channel found
Open Records Request Form is served via 5il.co shortlink (https://5il.co/2nw0a) rather than a stable on-domain URL

public_comment.deadline_rule: Sign up on the provided sign-up sheet prior to the start of the regular board meeting
public_comment.notes: From the About the BOE page: 'Members of the public who wish to speak at a regular board meeting must sign up on the provided sign up sheet prior to the start of the board meeting.' Meetings at the District Office, 595 Prince Ave, Athens; live-streamed and archived on the district YouTube channel. No time limit stated on this page.

clarke-county-school-district-ga.notes: Apptegy site (verified via raw HTML; WebFetch truncates it). Simbli S=36030957 linked sitewide for Meeting Agendas, policies, and 'District Policies Available for Public Comment'. Open records page instructs: download form (5il.co/2nw0a) and email to Dr. Cyndee Perdue Moore at openrecords@clarke.k12.ga.us, 706-546-7721 ext. 79402 — role alias plus named officer. Domain-confusion hazard: clarkecountyschools.org is Clarke County AL (Grove Hill); the esteadham@clarkecountyschools.org contact surfaced in search results belongs to the Alabama district, not Athens. Low onboarding cost: clean Simbli scrape + plain role-alias email intake.
